ast.name: textContent
ast.source: These are some extra controls currently designed for me (Santi), so unless you are me, which you probably aren't, just close this and never try to get here again.
ast.target: 這些額外控制項僅為開發者（Santi）設計。除非您是本人，否則請關閉此視窗並避免再次存取。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: But if you are me, enter the secret word to get in here:
ast.target: 若您為開發者本人，請輸入密語以進入：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Ctrl/Cmd-click copies the card with source and section markers. Disable to copy only plain card text.
ast.target: 啟用後，按住 Ctrl/Cmd 並點擊將會複製帶有來源與區段標記的卡片。停用此選項則僅複製純文字卡片內容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, clicking links to headings in other files (e.g., [[Other Note#Heading]]) will open the file in branch-writing view and navigate to the card containing that heading. When disabled, uses standard Obsidian behavior (opens in editor mode).
ast.target: 啟用後，點擊指向其他檔案標題的連結（例如 [[其他筆記#標題]]）將會以分支寫作視圖開啟該檔案，並導航至包含該標題的卡片。停用此選項則使用 Obsidian 標準行為（以編輯器模式開啟）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show or hide the "Name section" option when right-clicking on cards
ast.target: 在卡片上按右鍵時，顯示或隱藏「名稱區段」選項

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show or hide the "Archive section" option when right-clicking on cards
ast.target: 在卡片上按右鍵時，顯示或隱藏「封存區段」選項

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show or hide the "Switch to heading" option when right-clicking on cards
ast.target: 在卡片上按右鍵時，顯示或隱藏「切換為標題」選項

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show or hide the "Replace section from clipboard" option when right-clicking on cards
ast.target: 在卡片上按右鍵時，顯示或隱藏「從剪貼簿取代區段」選項

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show or hide the "Duplicate branch" option when right-clicking on cards
ast.target: 在卡片上按右鍵時，顯示或隱藏「複製分支」選項

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the typing animation commands in the command palette (Start animation, Pause/resume animation, Reset animation, Animate to vertical layout)
ast.target: 啟用指令面板中的打字動畫指令（開始動畫、暫停/恢復動畫、重置動畫、動畫至垂直佈局）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable presentation commands in the command palette (Open presentation window, Sync presentation window to active card)
ast.target: 啟用指令面板中的簡報指令（開啟簡報視窗、將簡報視窗同步至作用中卡片）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the special image gallery and fullscreen lightbox behavior for cards with multiple images
ast.target: 針對包含多張圖片的卡片，啟用特殊的圖片庫與全螢幕燈箱效果

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables three commands: "Open manual animation window", "Animate active card in manual animation window", and "Reset manual animation window" (clears queued/in-progress manual typing so you can replay from a clean state).
ast.target: 啟用三項指令：「開啟手動動畫視窗」、「在手動動畫視窗中為作用中卡片製作動畫」以及「重置手動動畫視窗」（清除佇列中或進行中的手動打字，以便從初始狀態重新播放）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables the "Type clipboard into new card" command, which creates a new card and types the current clipboard text into it letter by letter.
ast.target: 啟用「將剪貼簿內容輸入至新卡片」指令，該指令會建立一張新卡片，並將目前剪貼簿中的文字逐字輸入至該卡片中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pauses Obsidian's editor Vim mode (note editing) while Branch Writing is open and restores it when you leave, so editing keys don't clash with the plugin. Does not affect Vim-style navigation elsewhere in the app.
ast.target: 當 Branch Writing 開啟時暫停 Obsidian 編輯器的 Vim 模式（筆記編輯），並在離開時恢復，以避免編輯按鍵與插件衝突。此設定不影響應用程式其他位置的 Vim 風格導航。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, you can use h/j/k/l keys for left/down/up/right navigation in addition to arrow keys.
ast.target: 啟用後，除了方向鍵外，您還可以使用 h/j/k/l 鍵進行左/下/上/右導航。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show or hide the "More options" submenu when right-clicking on cards
ast.target: 在卡片上按右鍵時顯示或隱藏「更多選項」子選單

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, new documents will include "branch-writing: true" in the YAML frontmatter.
ast.target: 啟用後，新文件將在 YAML 前言（frontmatter）中包含「branch-writing: true」。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, all parts of the active note (parent, child, and sibling cards) will be highlighted with a nice blue color to visually connect related content.
ast.target: 啟用後，活動筆記的所有部分（父卡片、子卡片和同級卡片）將以醒目的藍色高亮顯示，以視覺化連結相關內容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Local folder containing typing audio. Leave blank to disable.
ast.target: 包含打字音效的本地資料夾。留空則停用此功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show section numbers on each card
ast.target: 在每張卡片上顯示章節編號

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Switch between your current setup and a fresh install preview for Experimental defaults.
ast.target: 在您目前的設定與實驗性預設的全新安裝預覽之間進行切換。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Resets General, Colors, and Experimental preferences back to factory defaults. Document preferences, hotkeys, and style rules are not affected.
ast.target: 將「一般」、「顏色」與「實驗性」偏好設定重置為原廠預設值。文件偏好設定、快速鍵與樣式規則不受影響。
